name: Urban Edge Properties
summary: Urban Edge Properties (NYSE: UE) is a Maryland REIT that owns, manages, acquires, develops, and redevelops retail real estate, primarily in the Washington, D.C. to Boston corridor. Its portfolio comprises 69 shopping centers, two outlet centers, and two malls totaling approximately 17.2 million square feet of gross leasable area with a consolidated occupancy rate of 90.1%. Tenants include grocers, discounters, big-box retailers, entertainment offerings, department stores, and restaurants.

products.name: Shopping Centers
products.description: Ownership and management of 69 retail shopping centers in the Washington, D.C. to Boston corridor.

products.name: Outlet Centers
products.description: Ownership and management of two outlet centers as part of the retail real estate portfolio.

products.name: Malls
products.description: Ownership and management of two mall properties totaling part of the 17.2 million sf portfolio.

products.name: Development and Redevelopment Projects
products.description: Active development, redevelopment, and anchor repositioning projects totaling $165.5 million as of December 31, 2025, with $85.6 million remaining to be funded.
